---
title: ""
short_title: ""
slug: ""

description: ""
tldr: ""

author: "Harold Young"
publish_date: ""
updated_date: ""
reading_time: ""
tags: []

series: ""
series_part:

cover_image: "images/cover.jpg"
og_image: "images/cover.jpg"

canonical_url: ""
license: ""

syndication:
  medium: ""
  substack: ""
  bluesky: ""
  youtube: ""
  linkedin: ""
  hackernews: ""
  reddit: ""

status: draft
---
